title: Hypothesis Strengthening
theme: A tentative theory that gains support over time
description: Prompts that should cause the system to create a tentative hypothesis and then strengthen it as new evidence accumulates.

rounds.prompt: I keep seeing 11:11 on the clock often enough that I notice it.
Once I have noticed a repeated thing, I start half-expecting it and then spotting it more.
Reading about the frequency illusion feels uncomfortably close to what I am doing with repeated clock times.
The repeated-time thing makes more sense as selective attention than as a message.

checkpoints.label: The system should be willing to create a tentative bridge early

assertions.reason: A plausible but uncertain explanation path should be tracked as a hypothesis.

finalAssertions.reason: The scenario should leave behind at least one tracked theory artifact.
Later evidence should explicitly support the earlier note instead of staying disconnected.
